## Meeting Purpose

[Strategy Sprint Standup to discuss progress and next steps across multiple client accounts.](https://fathom.video/share/tA_qvE2Vhs82BmBdDVRm6Nb-ihw4DBDK?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [DogmanCode: Aiming for 10 blog posts/week, focusing on quality content clusters. Need to coordinate 60k/month upsell and transition to full-time team.](https://fathom.video/share/tA_qvE2Vhs82BmBdDVRm6Nb-ihw4DBDK?tab=summary&timestamp=34.0)
  - [Multiple accounts require standardized image creation and blog templates. New designer (Katya) starting Monday to help address this.](https://fathom.video/share/tA_qvE2Vhs82BmBdDVRm6Nb-ihw4DBDK?tab=summary&timestamp=740.0)
  - [Gong call transcript analysis emerging as common client request; team to explore building this capability.](https://fathom.video/share/tA_qvE2Vhs82BmBdDVRm6Nb-ihw4DBDK?tab=summary&timestamp=1122.0)
  - [Week 1 client engagement critical: frequent updates, CMS access, analytics setup, and scheduling weekly calls are priorities.](https://fathom.video/share/tA_qvE2Vhs82BmBdDVRm6Nb-ihw4DBDK?tab=summary&timestamp=1750.0)

## Topics

### DogmanCode Content Strategy

  - [Aiming for high engagement metrics to build domain authority](https://fathom.video/share/tA_qvE2Vhs82BmBdDVRm6Nb-ihw4DBDK?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
  - [Planning for 60k/month upsell to support two full-time team members](https://fathom.video/share/tA_qvE2Vhs82BmBdDVRm6Nb-ihw4DBDK?tab=summary&timestamp=274.0)
